pageContext.name: Vicious
pageContext.description: Sideshow and First 4 Figures is proud to introduce the latest Cowboy Bebop resin collectible, Vicious. This is the fifth statue to release in the First 4 Figures' Cowboy Bebop lineup.   The concept for this statue revolves around Vicious' indifferent yet ruthless personality, which you can immediately tell from the expression on his face to his seemingly passive posture. Being the cunning man that he is, he's secretly holding a knife behind his back so that he could strike at any given moment without his enemies expecting it. And perched on his left shoulder is his iconic pet bird that follows him everywhere.   On top of the base is the Cowboy Bebop logo, and on the side is an official artwork scroll, which is present in all the statues from this lineup, including the Faye Valentine Statue and the Ed and Ein Statue.
